extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POEL attacked inside 1km on finishing circuit climb, took yellow jersey and stage win ahead of sprint finish
tactical_patterns: VAN DER POEL attacked finishing circuit climb twice for bonus seconds before final kilometer winning move.
POGACAR and ROGLIC marked each other for bonus seconds while VAN DER POEL exploited gap for yellow jersey.
INEOS controlled final corner positioning despite having no GC contender in yellow jersey contention.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: took yellow jersey on stage 2 in Tour debut by attacking punchy finish twice for time gaps
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: lost handful of seconds on finishing circuit alongside Lopez, poor start to GC campaign
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: neutral: focused on marking Roglic for bonus seconds rather than controlling Van der Poel's stage-winning move
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: matched Pogacar for bonus seconds but both allowed 8-second gap to Van der Poel for yellow
